creator: josh@tcbug.org
text:
sysutils/vobcopy changed their download URL

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    josh@tcbug.org
 COMMENT=       Decrypts and copies DVD .vob files--cr8k0mj59eKDJO8hyyBPkH4FAiDygElMIFh1O7VFoqtgoPwz
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.old        2008-05-15 07:48:54.000000000 +0000
+++ Makefile    2008-05-15 07:49:23.000000000 +0000
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      vobcopy
 PORTVERSION=   1.1.1
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=  http://lpn.rnbhq.org/download/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://vobcopy.org/download/
How-To-Repeat: 

cd /usr/ports/sysutils/vobcopy && make fetch
